Explanation: Random Forest under SMOTE shows feature-level contributions learned from synthetically balanced attack traffic.
Random Forest under undersampling shows feature contributions learned from authentic balanced traffic observations.
Logistic Regression under SMOTE demonstrates linear feature contribution patterns.
Logistic Regression under undersampling demonstrates interpretable linear decision behaviour on authentic traffic samples.
CNN under SMOTE shows non-linear feature attribution patterns learned from balanced traffic data.
CNN under undersampling shows non-linear attribution patterns learned from authentic balanced traffic observations.
Isolation Forest under SMOTE section is interpreted through anomaly score contribution behaviour.
Isolation Forest under undersampling is interpreted through anomaly score contribution behaviour.
